title: Fujitora Changes the Balance
description: Pages 6–10 focus on fujitora changes the balance, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as law's battle against Doflamingo reaches a breaking point, forcing Luffy and the others to rethink the rescue plan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But aren't you a genius?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Well if you're going that far, then just leave it to me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: CUCK!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: If I have this right, you were just a lure...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: LAW...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: "I suppose I'll

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And in the meantime, the straw- hat crew...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Was going to destroy the factory...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So even if you died... Kaidou would still come after me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That's about the gist of it, no?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: But you haven't bought nearly as much time as you'd hoped... and they still seem to be at a loss.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You said you were "using" them, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Inherent to your plan was the place- went of an enormous amount of trust on them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Why... Why would you trust Strawhat that much!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: .....Haa....haa.... surely, "D" will once again call forth a storm.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What're you doing here, Zoro!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: you! If you knew there was a tournament like this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Why didn't you invite me to come along!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Yeah, sorry about that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: And here I've been, running around the whole city.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: you!! That is not why we are here!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Zoro...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Vice Admiral Bastille!! As we suspected, that man is the pirate Hunter!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: And the one inside is likely to be strawhat.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: "Lucy," right? No wonder he's so strong... so they're really here, in this country....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: But just keep circling them for now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: If, in our attempt to capture them, we caused a commotion...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: The hordes of villains emerging from the colosseum...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: would become wary of our presence.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: The partial-pants who've already been eliminated are...

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: In "C-block," Don Chinjao... as well as...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: I don't recognize any of the names in these notes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Um, hold on here....??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: ...Hmm?? Who exactly did we come here to capture...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: ...It operates like this, yes?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: What're you doing?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: PURM- RIRM..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Sanji-Dono told me to call should we meet with Luffy-Dono.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Oh, right...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Ahh... anyway, Luffy, the Col- Ossem is Sur- Rounded by Marines.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Hmmmph!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: So Cavalier about it!! That is the main issue at hand, that it is!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Waters near dress- Rosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: PURUR URLRU RURU...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: That should be kingdom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Go ahead and connect to usopp with that one, chopper.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Okay.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Gatcha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Are you there, Sanji?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: It's me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: GAT- CHA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: USOP report- ing in!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: This should be everyone, except for law.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Everyone, give us your updates!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: Oww!! Franky, here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: but I'm with usopp and Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: Right now, we're....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: We're with the anti-dofla- mingo group, the Royal Riku army.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: "An army!?

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: an army of dwarves.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: Dwar- VES!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: This is a confer- once of Heroes!! Please don't listen in!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Under- stood, usoland!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #58
dialogue.text: Luffy, remember that weird soldier we met in front of the Col- OSSeum?

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Yeah!! But what about the dwarves!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #59
dialogue.text: He's actually the captain of this Brigade!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #60
dialogue.text: Just so happens that today, they're planning to take down Doflamingo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #61
dialogue.text: Ah!! That guy!! The toy soldier!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #62
dialogue.text: The one who Rebecca was trying to stop!! Hey, frankly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #63
dialogue.text: You have to hold back that army!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #64
dialogue.text: Don't be stupid!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #65
dialogue.text: In fact I'm telling you the opposite!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #66
dialogue.text: Have you talked with that Rebecca?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #67
dialogue.text: Yeah, she seems like a really good person!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #68
dialogue.text: She was really low on cash, but she treated me to three bento boxes anyway!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #69
dialogue.text: But, listen, as soon as she entered the ring...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #70
dialogue.text: The crowd really started to piss me off!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #71
dialogue.text: I feel the same way as you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #72
dialogue.text: I don't think
